candidate: SEASONAL-LORA: twin LoRA adapter sets with external-context-sensor-driven gradual multi-step bias-blend swap (snowshoe hare seasonal coat-color analog).

per_result_judgments.title: Phenotype-Style Gradual Adapter Alternation via External-Cue Routing (2025/11)
per_result_judgments.reason: Phenotype-style adapter alternation with external-cue gradual swap — content-word twin; saturates all thresholds.

summary: 6 of 8 results clear the hit threshold, including two near-direct twins (ranks 7 and 8) covering twin-LoRA external-sensor gradual bias-blend and phenotype-style adapter alternation, plus 4 mid-strong overlaps (dynamic LoRA combinations, iterative LoRA merging, embedded multi-task LoRA routing, heterogeneous LoRA serving). The candidate's distinctive contribution (twin adapters + external-cue gradual multi-step bias-blend) is already covered by prior/contemporaneous work, so the proposal is not novel.
